message:
test(observability): cover bare unix_fallback call alongside the split pair

The io_uring latency-metric test was only exercising the new direction-
specific fallback recorders. Added a plain record_io_uring_unix_fallback()
call so the test also covers the path where a legacy caller only bumps
the aggregate counter without specifying read/write.

Expected counter values:
  read_unix_fallbacks_total  = 1 (from record_io_uring_read_unix_fallback)
  write_unix_fallbacks_total = 1 (from record_io_uring_write_unix_fallback)
  unix_fallbacks_total       = 3 (bare + the two split calls)

Which confirms the invariant that the aggregate counter still advances
on every fallback regardless of which recorder the call-site used.
